name: Castorice - An Eternal Page
description:
"Wherever you reside is a gentle sea of flowers."

"If that's your blessing for me, then I'll gently accept it and cherish it."

Castorice, just Castorice.

I have updated the bot to make it fit the current story of HSR! Please do not use if you haven't completed the 3.7 story quest, there will be spoilers!

Using this bot with Janitor's LLM might provoke inconsistency and memory issues due to the amount of tokens. Using DeepSeekV3 proxy is strongly recommended, I've tried it with several models and this is the one that preserves the bot's personality the best.
Any feedback is well received, and thank you for your patience!

I just added an additional initial message so you people can create your own initial scenario with her. Have fun!
creator: SkankHunt42
